title: Trilegal advises Edelweiss Infrastructure, SEPL Energy on divestment of stake in 12 solar SPVs to Anzen Trust
description: Edelweiss Infrastructure Yield Plus, an infrastructure fund managed by EAAA India Alternatives Limited, and SEPL Energy Private Limited have divested their entire stake in 12 solar project special purpose vehicles to Anzen India Energy Yield Plus Trust.Trilegal advised Edelweiss Infrastructure Yield Plus and SEPL Energy on this transaction.The Corporate team advising on the matter was led by Kunal Chandra (Partner), with support from Kunal Paleja (Senior Associate) and Associates Sharnam Vaswani
